# Codex Conversion Skills, Prompts, and Canonical Entry Points

## Problem

Mirrors the real corpus's `codex-skill-prompt-entrypoints.md`: uses `created:`
instead of `date:`, an unquoted title, and flow-style `tags: [...]`. The date
must be captured from `created:`.
